'''yokawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachidic|arachidic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachidic|arachidic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yokawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokawithi|yokawithi]] || [[word:yokawiji|yokawiji]] || [[word:yokawishi|yokawishi]] || [[word:yokawiki|yokawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokawuthuthu|yokawuthuthu]] || [[word:yokawujuju|yokawujuju]] || [[word:yokawushushu|yokawushushu]] || [[word:yokawukuku|yokawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokawuthu|yokawuthu]] || [[word:yokawuju|yokawuju]] || [[word:yokawushu|yokawushu]] || [[word:yokawuku|yokawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokawufthuf|yokawufthuf]] || [[word:yokawufjuf|yokawufjuf]] || [[word:yokawufshuf|yokawufshuf]] || [[word:yokawufkuf|yokawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokawethe|yokawethe]] || [[word:yokaweje|yokaweje]] || [[word:yokaweshe|yokaweshe]] || [[word:yokaweke|yokaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokawothotho|yokawothotho]] || [[word:yokawojojo|yokawojojo]] || [[word:yokawoshosho|yokawoshosho]] || [[word:yokawokoko|yokawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokawotho|yokawotho]] || [[word:yokawojo|yokawojo]] || [[word:yokawosho|yokawosho]] || [[word:yokawoko|yokawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokawofthof|yokawofthof]] || [[word:yokawofjof|yokawofjof]] || [[word:yokawofshof|yokawofshof]] || [[word:yokawofkof|yokawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfthÃŸf|yokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfjÃŸf|yokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfshÃŸf|yokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfkÃŸf|yokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yokawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yokawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yokawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yokawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfthÃŸf|yokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfjÃŸf|yokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfshÃŸf|yokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfkÃŸf|yokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfthÃŸf|yokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfjÃŸf|yokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfshÃŸf|yokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yokawÃŸfkÃŸf|yokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yokawÃḊthÃḊ|yokawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yokawÃḊjÃḊ|yokawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yokawÃḊshÃḊ|yokawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yokawÃḊkÃḊ|yokawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yokawathatha|yokawathatha]] || [[word:yokawajaja|yokawajaja]] || [[word:yokawashasha|yokawashasha]] || [[word:yokawakaka|yokawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yokawatha|yokawatha]] || [[word:yokawaja|yokawaja]] || [[word:yokawasha|yokawasha]] || [[word:yokawaka|yokawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yokawafthaf|yokawafthaf]] || [[word:yokawafjaf|yokawafjaf]] || [[word:yokawafshaf|yokawafshaf]] || [[word:yokawafkaf|yokawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yokawasha|yokawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokawshÃḋsha|yokawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokawrosha|yokawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokawmusha|yokawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokawyasha|yokawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokawnkshÃḋsha|goyokawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokawnkrosha|goyokawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokawnkmusha|goyokawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokawnkyasha|goyokawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yokakawasha|yokakawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokakawshÃḋsha|yokakawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokakawrosha|yokakawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokakawmusha|yokakawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokakawyasha|yokakawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokakawnkshÃḋsha|goyokakawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokakawnkrosha|goyokakawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokakawnkmusha|goyokakawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokakawnkyasha|goyokakawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yekÃḊwasha|yekÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yekÃḊwshÃḋsha|yekÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yekÃḊwrosha|yekÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yekÃḊwmusha|yekÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yekÃḊwyasha|yekÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyekÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|goyekÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyekÃḊwnkrosha|goyekÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyekÃḊwnkmusha|goyekÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyekÃḊwnkyasha|goyekÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yokfawasha|yokfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yokfawshÃḋsha|yokfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yokfawrosha|yokfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yokfawmusha|yokfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yokfawyasha|yokfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyokfawnkshÃḋsha|goyokfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyokfawnkrosha|goyokfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyokfawnkmusha|goyokfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyokfawnkyasha|goyokfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
